title: The Shawshank Redemption
extract: The Shawshank Redemption is a 1994 American prison drama film written and directed by Frank Darabont, based on the 1982 Stephen King novella Rita Hayworth and Shawshank Redemption.

title: The Godfather
extract: The Godfather is a 1972 American crime film directed by Francis Ford Coppola, based on Mario Puzo's best-selling 1969 novel of the same name.

title: The Dark Knight
extract: The Dark Knight is a 2008 superhero film directed by Christopher Nolan, the second installment of The Dark Knight Trilogy.

title: Pulp Fiction
extract: Pulp Fiction is a 1994 American crime film written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, known for its eclectic dialogue and nonlinear storyline.

title: Fight Club
extract: Fight Club is a 1999 American film directed by David Fincher, based on the 1996 novel by Chuck Palahniuk.

title: Inception
extract: Inception is a 2010 science fiction action film written and directed by Christopher Nolan, about a thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology.

title: The Matrix
extract: The Matrix is a 1999 science fiction action film written and directed by the Wachowskis, depicting a dystopian future in which humanity is trapped inside a simulated reality.

title: Goodfellas
extract: Goodfellas is a 1990 American biographical crime film directed by Martin Scorsese, an adaptation of the 1985 nonfiction book Wiseguy by Nicholas Pileggi.

title: Interstellar
extract: Interstellar is a 2014 epic science fiction film directed by Christopher Nolan, following a group of astronauts who travel through a wormhole near Saturn in search of a new home for mankind.

title: Parasite
extract: Parasite is a 2019 South Korean black comedy thriller film directed by Bong Joon-ho. It became the first non-English-language film to win the Academy Award for Best Picture.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
extract: The Fellowship of the Ring is a 2001 epic fantasy adventure film directed by Peter Jackson, based on the first volume of J. R. R. Tolkien's The Lord of the Rings.

title: Forrest Gump
extract: Forrest Gump is a 1994 American comedy-drama film directed by Robert Zemeckis, based on the 1986 novel by Winston Groom.

title: Spirited Away
extract: Spirited Away is a 2001 Japanese animated fantasy film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki and produced by Studio Ghibli.

title: Gladiator
extract: Gladiator is a 2000 epic historical drama film directed by Ridley Scott, starring Russell Crowe as a Roman general seeking vengeance.

title: City of God
extract: City of God (Cidade de Deus) is a 2002 Brazilian crime film directed by Fernando Meirelles and Kátia Lund, depicting the growth of organized crime in the Cidade de Deus suburb of Rio de Janeiro.

title: Central Station
extract: Central Station (Central do Brasil) is a 1998 Brazilian drama film directed by Walter Salles, following a former schoolteacher who helps a boy search for his father.

title: Whiplash
extract: Whiplash is a 2014 American psychological drama film written and directed by Damien Chazelle, about an ambitious jazz drummer and his abusive instructor.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
extract: The Silence of the Lambs is a 1991 American psychological horror film directed by Jonathan Demme, based on Thomas Harris' 1988 novel.

title: Se7en
extract: Se7en is a 1995 American crime thriller film directed by David Fincher, in which two detectives hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as a motif.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
extract: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse is a 2018 American animated superhero film featuring Miles Morales, produced by Sony Pictures Animation.
